TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Afan singsi == O mipalowaday to tilid no misa'Amisay Ano paka'arawayto kiso tona takaraway ko tireng, hato kakerengay ko ngiha'a matawa ato ikakaay ko fana' a misano'Amis a somowal hawi, caayto ko mamapawan iso kona tamdaw, cingra hawi, ci Afan singsi, o nai Amilikaay a tayni a malasingsi ko tatodong ningra. Ono holam a ngangan ningra i, ci Fang Min-Ing han. O tadangangan ningra tono Amilika hawi, ci Virginia Ann Fey (1933-1993). Itiya yo 1959 miheca 8 folad 18 romi'ad haw i, mapolong ato kapot ningra a tayni i Taywan, minanamho cingra tono Holam a sowal i Taypak, ta malinah cingra a tayra i Tai-tong i 1964 miheca 3 folad 1 romi'ad. Itinito ko pisatapng ningra a malasingsi i 'Amis a finacadan tahira i piliyasan ningra tonini a hkal a ma'orip. O pinanam to sowal no 'Amis ato O pirocok to tayal a mifalic to Cudad. Kona o papasifana' ci Afan to sapina'on to tireng a midipot, ta maliyas ko adada. Nikawrira, tona malakapot cingra aci Toris Foksi a matayal i Madawdaw no Singko i, sacifaloco' saan cingra to sapifalicaw to Sowal no Kawas a patalano'Amis. Ta ira ko pinanam ningra to sowal ato pinangan no'orip no 'Amis nai papinapina no kaying—ci Apong, ci 'Oseng, ci 'Oping. Tadamalalok ci Afan a minanam, saka mahmek ko cimacima i cingraan. Yo mahrekto ko tayal ni Toris Foksi i 1965 hawi, miliyasto cingra to Taywan, ta ci Afan singsi to ko mirocokay to tatayalen a ma^min to sapifalic to Sowal no Kawas. O sakaci^pocaw no tayal, saka masacacay ci Afan a tayra i Tailand a kitakit a mikapot to sa'opo no Lin-KoKu i 1965 miheca, itira a malalicay ko tayraay aca a sayho to sapa'orip to sowal no Pangcah. Taloma' sato i, malalicay cingra ato iing no 'Amis Ciwkay to sapisanga' to tilid no 'Amis to saka calowayaw a mapa'orip ko sowal no 'Amis ato madama haca no Seng-Cin-Kong-Howi kona dmak, saka irato a malahci a mapalowad ko tilid no masa'Amisay pakayni i picaliw to tilid no Loma. Iti:ya ho i 1956 miheca haw i, na iraayto ko "Pihtatanaman to tilid no 'Amis" sananay a codad a maasipto no salikaka, kirami ono ㄅㄆㄇㄈ ho a tilid kiraan. Masopsop ko 500 a sowal to nipasa'opoan to sowal no Pa'ilasen, Posko, Fakong, Ciwkangan, singko. 1966 hiheca to haw i, mafalicto a palanoLoma a tilid ko ananamen, saka irato ko "Fa^lohay a Pinanaman to tilid no 'Amis" sananay a codad a marina'. Orasaka, malipahak kita to nika irato no cidek a tilid no mita o misa'Amisay, o mamasarayray to a mapa'orip ko sowal ita o 'Amis. Nikawrira, o karorayan hawi, ona pisaliyaw haca a misalingtad a miraod to kiwkay no kasaniyaroaro' a pasifana' tona fa^lohay a tilid no 'Amis. O nika dado^do no nipirina' to kalocudad no 'Amis O kakahmekan ko nitayalan na Afan ato marariday a midadamay to tayal ningra a kasakapot oya papinapina a foksi, o malahciay nangra a marina' a codad hawi, 1966 mihecaan no aasipen a mamangay a ratoh—"Likat", 1970 miheca no "Matay", 1974 no"Fa^lohay a Katatlekan no Fangcalay Codad" (masasotiri' ko tilid no 'Amis ato Holam), 1975 miheca no "Kayakay no Nga'ayay a Ratoh", 1979 miheca no "'Olic"(masasotiri' ko tilid no 'Amis ato Holam), 1981 miheca no "O polong no Fa^lohay a Katatlek ato cidek no Katlangay a Katatlek no Fangcalay Codad" ato Fangcalay a Radiw (masasotiri' ko tilid no 'Amis ato Holam). Nasaan hawi, Malinah ci Afan a tayraan i Sin-Cowang no Taypak i 1983 miheca, halo polong no lalosidan ningra a mahawikidto ningra. O saka saan hawi, hai mangata ako a maliso' ko i Tokayay a malinahay a matayal ato micodaday a salikaka ato o kiwkay no misa'Amisay saan ko harateng no faloco' ningra. Talacowa, mato matkeday ningra ko tatayalen to sapifalic to sowal no Kawas, kirami caay ka sawaden ningra ko nanga—toan ningra a tatayalen, o kdec hananay ningra ko safatel a ma'orip, o flon hananay ningra ko polong no dafong ningra to saka lahciaw a mirina' to codad. Onini hawi, o pisarocod no niyah a mirko tono Kawasan a patatodong i cingraan. Yo itinito i Taypak cingra i, malahciay a nirina'an ningra a codad hawi, 1986 miheca no "Amis Dictionary" (masasotiri' to tilid no 'Amis, no Holam ato no Amilika) ato 1992 miheca no "O 'orip no 'Amis" (masasotiri' to tilid no 'Amis, no Holam ato no Amilika) ato 1993 miheca no "365 a Kakimadan no Fangcalay Cudad". O nipifolsak to sapaloma to saki 'orip no 'Amis ato pirocok to rayray no to'as Yo ccay a romi'ad no 1993 a mihcaan, masadak ci Afan a talaroma a niyaro' a ira ko dadmaken ningra, kirami itira cingra i lalan a mafahal a mastol no haiya cingra, tadatata'ang ko doka ningra, na paising cingra to tolo a folad hawi, tadasida'it ko safa ningra to fa'inayan ci Marko, saka alaanto no safa cingra a patala Amilika a paising, caay pakaala to pinapina a folad i, mangalef ko adada ni Afan singsi, saka pelek sato cingra. Talacowa caay a tala ni Afan singsi a manina' ningra ko ma^minayto a mafalic a marina' a Fangcalay Cudad i 1997 a mihcaan, kirami mato Sowal ni Yohani itira i Fangcalay Cudad, sowal sa, Tona mapatay ko ccay a sasafakan no ^mi i sra, saka malengaw cira a maloficto ko hci no minaloan nira. saan. So'linay, o tadamaanay ko nitayalan no 'orip ni Afan singsi, o matatodongay a tatahada'oc a kahmeken no mita o kasarayray. Talacowa caay a tala ni Afan singsi a manina' ningra ko ma^minayto a mafalic a marina' a Fangcalay Cudad I 1997 a mihcaan, kirami mato Sowal ni Yohani itira i Fangcalay Cudad, sowal sa, "Tona mapatay ko ccay a sasafakan no ^mi i sra, saka malengaw cira a maloficto ko hci no minaloan nira," saan.
S.PHON: == afan siŋsi == o~u mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u misaʡamisaj ano~u pakaʡarawajto~u kiso~u to~una takarawaj ko~u tirəŋ, ħato~u kakərəŋaj ko~u ŋiħaʡa matawa ato~u ikakaaj ko~u fanaʡ a misano~uʡamis a so~umo~uwaɾ ħawi, ʦaajto~u ko~u mamapawan iso~u ko~una tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦiŋra ħawi, ʦi afan siŋsi, o~u nai amiɾikaaj a tajni a maɾasiŋsi ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ niŋra. o~uno~u ħo~uɾam a ŋaŋan niŋra i, ʦi faŋ min-iŋ ħan. o~u taɬ~ɮaŋaŋan niŋra to~uno~u amiɾika ħawi, ʦi b~vir*inia ann fəj (****-****). itija jo~u **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħaw i, mapo~uɾo~uŋ ato~u kapo~ut niŋra a tajni i tajwan, minanamħo~u ʦiŋra to~uno~u ħo~uɾam a so~uwaɾ i tajpak, ta maɾinaħ ʦiŋra a tajra i tai-to~uŋ i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. itinito~u ko~u pisatapŋ niŋra a maɾasiŋsi i ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan taħira i piɾijasan niŋra to~unini a ħkaɾ a maʡo~urip. o~u pinanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis ato~u o~u piro~uʦo~uk to~u tajaɾ a mifaɾiʦ to~u ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ. ko~una o~u papasifanaʡ ʦi afan to~u sapinaʡo~un to~u tirəŋ a miɬ~ɮipo~ut, ta maɾijas ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa. nikawrira, to~una maɾakapo~ut ʦiŋra aʦi to~uris fo~uksi a matajaɾ i maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw no~u siŋko~u i, saʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ saan ʦiŋra to~u sapifaɾiʦaw to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas a pataɾano~uʡamis. ta ira ko~u pinanam niŋra to~u so~uwaɾ ato~u pinaŋan no~uʡo~urip no~u ʡamis nai papinapina no~u kajiŋ*ʦi apo~uŋ, ʦi ʡo~usəŋ, ʦi ʡo~upiŋ. taɬ~ɮamaɾaɾo~uk ʦi afan a minanam, saka maħmək ko~u ʦimaʦima i ʦiŋraan. jo~u maħrəkto~u ko~u tajaɾ ni to~uris fo~uksi i **** ħawi, miɾijasto~u ʦiŋra to~u tajwan, ta ʦi afan siŋsi to~u ko~u miro~uʦo~ukaj to~u tatajaɾən a maʔmin to~u sapifaɾiʦ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas. o~u sakaʦiʔpo~uʦaw no~u tajaɾ, saka masaʦaʦaj ʦi afan a tajra i taiɾanɬ~ɮ a kitakit a mikapo~ut to~u saʡo~upo~u no~u ɾin-ko~uko~u~u i **** miħəʦa, itira a maɾaɾiʦaj ko~u tajraaj aʦa a sajħo~u to~u sapaʡo~urip to~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ. taɾo~umaʡ sato~u i, maɾaɾiʦaj ʦiŋra ato~u iiŋ no~u ʡamis ʦiwkaj to~u sapisaŋaʡ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis to~u saka ʦaɾo~uwajaw a mapaʡo~urip ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis ato~u maɬ~ɮama ħaʦa no~u səŋ-ʦin-ko~uŋ-ħo~uwi ko~una ɬ~ɮmak, saka irato~u a maɾaħʦi a mapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u masaʡamisaj pakajni i piʦaɾiw to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~uma. iti:ja ħo~u i **** miħəʦa ħaw i, na iraajto~u ko~u "piħtatanaman to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis" sananaj a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a maasipto~u no~u saɾikaka, kirami o~uno~u **** ħo~u a tiɾiɬ~ɮ kiraan. maso~upso~up ko~u *** a so~uwaɾ to~u nipasaʡo~upo~uan to~u so~uwaɾ no~u paʡiɾasən, po~usko~u, fako~uŋ, ʦiwkaŋan, siŋko~u. **** ħiħəʦa to~u ħaw i, mafaɾiʦto~u a paɾano~uɾo~uma a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u ananamən, saka irato~u ko~u "faʔɾo~uħaj a pinanaman to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis" sananaj a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a marinaʡ. o~urasaka, maɾipaħak kita to~u nika irato~u no~u ʦiɬ~ɮək a tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u mita o~u misaʡamisaj, o~u mamasarajraj to~u a mapaʡo~urip ko~u so~uwaɾ ita o~u ʡamis. nikawrira, o~u karo~urajan ħawi, o~una pisaɾijaw ħaʦa a misaɾiŋtaɬ~ɮ a mirao~uɬ~ɮ to~u kiwkaj no~u kasanijaro~uaro~uʡ a pasifanaʡ to~una faʔɾo~uħaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis. o~u nika ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʔɬ~ɮo~u no~u nipirinaʡ to~u kaɾo~uʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis o~u kakaħməkan ko~u nitajaɾan na afan ato~u marariɬ~ɮaj a miɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮamaj to~u tajaɾ niŋra a kasakapo~ut o~uja papinapina a fo~uksi, o~u maɾaħʦiaj naŋra a marinaʡ a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ħawi, **** miħəʦaan no~u aasipən a mamaŋaj a rato~uħ*"ɾikat", **** miħəʦa no~u "mataj", **** no~u"faʔɾo~uħaj a katatɾəkan no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ" (masaso~utiriʡ ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis ato~u ħo~uɾam), **** miħəʦa no~u "kajakaj no~u ŋaʡajaj a rato~uħ", **** miħəʦa no~u "ʡo~uɾiʦ"(masaso~utiriʡ ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis ato~u ħo~uɾam), **** miħəʦa no~u "o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u faʔɾo~uħaj a katatɾək ato~u ʦiɬ~ɮək no~u katɾaŋaj a katatɾək no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ" ato~u faŋʦaɾaj a raɬ~ɮiw (masaso~utiriʡ ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis ato~u ħo~uɾam). nasaan ħawi, maɾinaħ ʦi afan a tajraan i sin-ʦo~uwaŋ no~u tajpak i **** miħəʦa, ħaɾo~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan niŋra a maħawikiɬ~ɮto~u niŋra. o~u saka saan ħawi, ħai maŋata ako~u a maɾiso~uʡ ko~u i to~ukajaj a maɾinaħaj a matajaɾ ato~u miʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj a saɾikaka ato~u o~u kiwkaj no~u misaʡamisaj saan ko~u ħaratəŋ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra. taɾaʦo~uwa, mato~u matkəɬ~ɮaj niŋra ko~u tatajaɾən to~u sapifaɾiʦ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas, kirami ʦaaj ka sawaɬ~ɮən niŋra ko~u naŋa*to~uan niŋra a tatajaɾən, o~u kɬ~ɮəʦ ħananaj niŋra ko~u safatəɾ a maʡo~urip, o~u fɾo~un ħananaj niŋra ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ niŋra to~u saka ɾaħʦiaw a mirinaʡ to~u ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ. o~unini ħawi, o~u pisaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ no~u nijaħ a mirko~u to~uno~u kawasan a patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i ʦiŋraan. jo~u itinito~u i tajpak ʦiŋra i, maɾaħʦiaj a nirinaʡan niŋra a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ħawi, **** miħəʦa no~u "amis ɬ~ɮiʦtio~unarj" (masaso~utiriʡ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis, no~u ħo~uɾam ato~u no~u amiɾika) ato~u **** miħəʦa no~u "o~u ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis" (masaso~utiriʡ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis, no~u ħo~uɾam ato~u no~u amiɾika) ato~u **** miħəʦa no~u "*** a kakimaɬ~ɮan no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ". o~u nipifo~uɾsak to~u sapaɾo~uma to~u saki ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis ato~u piro~uʦo~uk to~u rajraj no~u to~uʡas jo~u ʦʦaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u **** a miħʦaan, masaɬ~ɮak ʦi afan a taɾaro~uma a nijaro~uʡ a ira ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮmakən niŋra, kirami itira ʦiŋra i ɾaɾan a mafaħaɾ a masto~uɾ no~u ħaija ʦiŋra, taɬ~ɮatataʡaŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮo~uka niŋra, na paisiŋ ʦiŋra to~u to~uɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ħawi, taɬ~ɮasiɬ~ɮaʡit ko~u safa niŋra to~u faʡinajan ʦi marko~u, saka aɾaanto~u no~u safa ʦiŋra a pataɾa amiɾika a paisiŋ, ʦaaj pakaaɾa to~u pinapina a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ i, maŋaɾəf ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ni afan siŋsi, saka pəɾək sato~u ʦiŋra. taɾaʦo~uwa ʦaaj a taɾa ni afan siŋsi a maninaʡ niŋra ko~u maʔminajto~u a mafaɾiʦ a marinaʡ a faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħʦaan, kirami mato~u so~uwaɾ ni jo~uħani itira i faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, so~uwaɾ sa, to~una mapataj ko~u ʦʦaj a sasafakan no~u ʔmi i sra, saka maɾəŋaw ʦira a maɾo~ufiʦto~u ko~u ħʦi no~u minaɾo~uan nira. saan. so~uʡɾinaj, o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ko~u nitajaɾan no~u ʡo~urip ni afan siŋsi, o~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a tataħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ a kaħməkən no~u mita o~u kasarajraj. taɾaʦo~uwa ʦaaj a taɾa ni afan siŋsi a maninaʡ niŋra ko~u maʔminajto~u a mafaɾiʦ a marinaʡ a faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħʦaan, kirami mato~u so~uwaɾ ni jo~uħani itira i faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, so~uwaɾ sa, "to~una mapataj ko~u ʦʦaj a sasafakan no~u ʔmi i sra, saka maɾəŋaw ʦira a maɾo~ufiʦto~u ko~u ħʦi no~u minaɾo~uan nira," saan.
S.FORM: == Afan singsi == O mipalowaday to tilid no misa'Amisay Ano paka'arawayto kiso tona takaraway ko tireng, hato kakerengay ko ngiha'a matawa ato ikakaay ko fana' a misano'Amis a somowal hawi, caayto ko mamapawan iso kona tamdaw, cingra hawi, ci Afan singsi, o nai Amilikaay a tayni a malasingsi ko tatodong ningra. Ono holam a ngangan ningra i, ci Fang Min-Ing han. O tadangangan ningra tono Amilika hawi, ci Virginia Ann Fey (1933-1993). Itiya yo 1959 miheca 8 folad 18 romi'ad haw i, mapolong ato kapot ningra a tayni i Taywan, minanamho cingra tono Holam a sowal i Taypak, ta malinah cingra a tayra i Tai-tong i 1964 miheca 3 folad 1 romi'ad. Itinito ko pisatapng ningra a malasingsi i 'Amis a finacadan tahira i piliyasan ningra tonini a hkal a ma'orip. O pinanam to sowal no 'Amis ato O pirocok to tayal a mifalic to Cudad. Kona o papasifana' ci Afan to sapina'on to tireng a midipot, ta maliyas ko adada. Nikawrira, tona malakapot cingra aci Toris Foksi a matayal i Madawdaw no Singko i, sacifaloco' saan cingra to sapifalicaw to Sowal no Kawas a patalano'Amis. Ta ira ko pinanam ningra to sowal ato pinangan no'orip no 'Amis nai papinapina no kaying—ci Apong, ci 'Oseng, ci 'Oping. Tadamalalok ci Afan a minanam, saka mahmek ko cimacima i cingraan. Yo mahrekto ko tayal ni Toris Foksi i 1965 hawi, miliyasto cingra to Taywan, ta ci Afan singsi to ko mirocokay to tatayalen a ma^min to sapifalic to Sowal no Kawas. O sakaci^pocaw no tayal, saka masacacay ci Afan a tayra i Tailand a kitakit a mikapot to sa'opo no Lin-KoKu i 1965 miheca, itira a malalicay ko tayraay aca a sayho to sapa'orip to sowal no Pangcah. Taloma' sato i, malalicay cingra ato iing no 'Amis Ciwkay to sapisanga' to tilid no 'Amis to saka calowayaw a mapa'orip ko sowal no 'Amis ato madama haca no Seng-Cin-Kong-Howi kona dmak, saka irato a malahci a mapalowad ko tilid no masa'Amisay pakayni i picaliw to tilid no Loma. Iti:ya ho i 1956 miheca haw i, na iraayto ko "Pihtatanaman to tilid no 'Amis" sananay a codad a maasipto no salikaka, kirami ono ㄅㄆㄇㄈ ho a tilid kiraan. Masopsop ko 500 a sowal to nipasa'opoan to sowal no Pa'ilasen, Posko, Fakong, Ciwkangan, singko. 1966 hiheca to haw i, mafalicto a palanoLoma a tilid ko ananamen, saka irato ko "Fa^lohay a Pinanaman to tilid no 'Amis" sananay a codad a marina'. Orasaka, malipahak kita to nika irato no cidek a tilid no mita o misa'Amisay, o mamasarayray to a mapa'orip ko sowal ita o 'Amis. Nikawrira, o karorayan hawi, ona pisaliyaw haca a misalingtad a miraod to kiwkay no kasaniyaroaro' a pasifana' tona fa^lohay a tilid no 'Amis. O nika dado^do no nipirina' to kalocudad no 'Amis O kakahmekan ko nitayalan na Afan ato marariday a midadamay to tayal ningra a kasakapot oya papinapina a foksi, o malahciay nangra a marina' a codad hawi, 1966 mihecaan no aasipen a mamangay a ratoh—"Likat", 1970 miheca no "Matay", 1974 no"Fa^lohay a Katatlekan no Fangcalay Codad" (masasotiri' ko tilid no 'Amis ato Holam), 1975 miheca no "Kayakay no Nga'ayay a Ratoh", 1979 miheca no "'Olic"(masasotiri' ko tilid no 'Amis ato Holam), 1981 miheca no "O polong no Fa^lohay a Katatlek ato cidek no Katlangay a Katatlek no Fangcalay Codad" ato Fangcalay a Radiw (masasotiri' ko tilid no 'Amis ato Holam). Nasaan hawi, Malinah ci Afan a tayraan i Sin-Cowang no Taypak i 1983 miheca, halo polong no lalosidan ningra a mahawikidto ningra. O saka saan hawi, hai mangata ako a maliso' ko i Tokayay a malinahay a matayal ato micodaday a salikaka ato o kiwkay no misa'Amisay saan ko harateng no faloco' ningra. Talacowa, mato matkeday ningra ko tatayalen to sapifalic to sowal no Kawas, kirami caay ka sawaden ningra ko nanga—toan ningra a tatayalen, o kdec hananay ningra ko safatel a ma'orip, o flon hananay ningra ko polong no dafong ningra to saka lahciaw a mirina' to codad. Onini hawi, o pisarocod no niyah a mirko tono Kawasan a patatodong i cingraan. Yo itinito i Taypak cingra i, malahciay a nirina'an ningra a codad hawi, 1986 miheca no "Amis Dictionary" (masasotiri' to tilid no 'Amis, no Holam ato no Amilika) ato 1992 miheca no "O 'orip no 'Amis" (masasotiri' to tilid no 'Amis, no Holam ato no Amilika) ato 1993 miheca no "365 a Kakimadan no Fangcalay Cudad". O nipifolsak to sapaloma to saki 'orip no 'Amis ato pirocok to rayray no to'as Yo ccay a romi'ad no 1993 a mihcaan, masadak ci Afan a talaroma a niyaro' a ira ko dadmaken ningra, kirami itira cingra i lalan a mafahal a mastol no haiya cingra, tadatata'ang ko doka ningra, na paising cingra to tolo a folad hawi, tadasida'it ko safa ningra to fa'inayan ci Marko, saka alaanto no safa cingra a patala Amilika a paising, caay pakaala to pinapina a folad i, mangalef ko adada ni Afan singsi, saka pelek sato cingra. Talacowa caay a tala ni Afan singsi a manina' ningra ko ma^minayto a mafalic a marina' a Fangcalay Cudad i 1997 a mihcaan, kirami mato Sowal ni Yohani itira i Fangcalay Cudad, sowal sa, Tona mapatay ko ccay a sasafakan no ^mi i sra, saka malengaw cira a maloficto ko hci no minaloan nira. saan. So'linay, o tadamaanay ko nitayalan no 'orip ni Afan singsi, o matatodongay a tatahada'oc a kahmeken no mita o kasarayray. Talacowa caay a tala ni Afan singsi a manina' ningra ko ma^minayto a mafalic a marina' a Fangcalay Cudad I 1997 a mihcaan, kirami mato Sowal ni Yohani itira i Fangcalay Cudad, sowal sa, "Tona mapatay ko ccay a sasafakan no ^mi i sra, saka malengaw cira a maloficto ko hci no minaloan nira," saan.
S.PHON: == afan siŋsi == o~u mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u misaʡamisaj ano~u pakaʡarawajto~u kiso~u to~una takarawaj ko~u tirəŋ, ħato~u kakərəŋaj ko~u ŋiħaʡa matawa ato~u ikakaaj ko~u fanaʡ a misano~uʡamis a so~umo~uwaɾ ħawi, ʦaajto~u ko~u mamapawan iso~u ko~una tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦiŋra ħawi, ʦi afan siŋsi, o~u nai amiɾikaaj a tajni a maɾasiŋsi ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ niŋra. o~uno~u ħo~uɾam a ŋaŋan niŋra i, ʦi faŋ min-iŋ ħan. o~u taɬ~ɮaŋaŋan niŋra to~uno~u amiɾika ħawi, ʦi b~vir*inia ann fəj (****-****). itija jo~u **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħaw i, mapo~uɾo~uŋ ato~u kapo~ut niŋra a tajni i tajwan, minanamħo~u ʦiŋra to~uno~u ħo~uɾam a so~uwaɾ i tajpak, ta maɾinaħ ʦiŋra a tajra i tai-to~uŋ i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. itinito~u ko~u pisatapŋ niŋra a maɾasiŋsi i ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan taħira i piɾijasan niŋra to~unini a ħkaɾ a maʡo~urip. o~u pinanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis ato~u o~u piro~uʦo~uk to~u tajaɾ a mifaɾiʦ to~u ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ. ko~una o~u papasifanaʡ ʦi afan to~u sapinaʡo~un to~u tirəŋ a miɬ~ɮipo~ut, ta maɾijas ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa. nikawrira, to~una maɾakapo~ut ʦiŋra aʦi to~uris fo~uksi a matajaɾ i maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw no~u siŋko~u i, saʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ saan ʦiŋra to~u sapifaɾiʦaw to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas a pataɾano~uʡamis. ta ira ko~u pinanam niŋra to~u so~uwaɾ ato~u pinaŋan no~uʡo~urip no~u ʡamis nai papinapina no~u kajiŋ*ʦi apo~uŋ, ʦi ʡo~usəŋ, ʦi ʡo~upiŋ. taɬ~ɮamaɾaɾo~uk ʦi afan a minanam, saka maħmək ko~u ʦimaʦima i ʦiŋraan. jo~u maħrəkto~u ko~u tajaɾ ni to~uris fo~uksi i **** ħawi, miɾijasto~u ʦiŋra to~u tajwan, ta ʦi afan siŋsi to~u ko~u miro~uʦo~ukaj to~u tatajaɾən a maʔmin to~u sapifaɾiʦ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas. o~u sakaʦiʔpo~uʦaw no~u tajaɾ, saka masaʦaʦaj ʦi afan a tajra i taiɾanɬ~ɮ a kitakit a mikapo~ut to~u saʡo~upo~u no~u ɾin-ko~uko~u~u i **** miħəʦa, itira a maɾaɾiʦaj ko~u tajraaj aʦa a sajħo~u to~u sapaʡo~urip to~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ. taɾo~umaʡ sato~u i, maɾaɾiʦaj ʦiŋra ato~u iiŋ no~u ʡamis ʦiwkaj to~u sapisaŋaʡ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis to~u saka ʦaɾo~uwajaw a mapaʡo~urip ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis ato~u maɬ~ɮama ħaʦa no~u səŋ-ʦin-ko~uŋ-ħo~uwi ko~una ɬ~ɮmak, saka irato~u a maɾaħʦi a mapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u masaʡamisaj pakajni i piʦaɾiw to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~uma. iti:ja ħo~u i **** miħəʦa ħaw i, na iraajto~u ko~u "piħtatanaman to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis" sananaj a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a maasipto~u no~u saɾikaka, kirami o~uno~u **** ħo~u a tiɾiɬ~ɮ kiraan. maso~upso~up ko~u *** a so~uwaɾ to~u nipasaʡo~upo~uan to~u so~uwaɾ no~u paʡiɾasən, po~usko~u, fako~uŋ, ʦiwkaŋan, siŋko~u. **** ħiħəʦa to~u ħaw i, mafaɾiʦto~u a paɾano~uɾo~uma a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u ananamən, saka irato~u ko~u "faʔɾo~uħaj a pinanaman to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis" sananaj a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a marinaʡ. o~urasaka, maɾipaħak kita to~u nika irato~u no~u ʦiɬ~ɮək a tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u mita o~u misaʡamisaj, o~u mamasarajraj to~u a mapaʡo~urip ko~u so~uwaɾ ita o~u ʡamis. nikawrira, o~u karo~urajan ħawi, o~una pisaɾijaw ħaʦa a misaɾiŋtaɬ~ɮ a mirao~uɬ~ɮ to~u kiwkaj no~u kasanijaro~uaro~uʡ a pasifanaʡ to~una faʔɾo~uħaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis. o~u nika ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʔɬ~ɮo~u no~u nipirinaʡ to~u kaɾo~uʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis o~u kakaħməkan ko~u nitajaɾan na afan ato~u marariɬ~ɮaj a miɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮamaj to~u tajaɾ niŋra a kasakapo~ut o~uja papinapina a fo~uksi, o~u maɾaħʦiaj naŋra a marinaʡ a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ħawi, **** miħəʦaan no~u aasipən a mamaŋaj a rato~uħ*"ɾikat", **** miħəʦa no~u "mataj", **** no~u"faʔɾo~uħaj a katatɾəkan no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ" (masaso~utiriʡ ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis ato~u ħo~uɾam), **** miħəʦa no~u "kajakaj no~u ŋaʡajaj a rato~uħ", **** miħəʦa no~u "ʡo~uɾiʦ"(masaso~utiriʡ ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis ato~u ħo~uɾam), **** miħəʦa no~u "o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u faʔɾo~uħaj a katatɾək ato~u ʦiɬ~ɮək no~u katɾaŋaj a katatɾək no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ" ato~u faŋʦaɾaj a raɬ~ɮiw (masaso~utiriʡ ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis ato~u ħo~uɾam). nasaan ħawi, maɾinaħ ʦi afan a tajraan i sin-ʦo~uwaŋ no~u tajpak i **** miħəʦa, ħaɾo~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan niŋra a maħawikiɬ~ɮto~u niŋra. o~u saka saan ħawi, ħai maŋata ako~u a maɾiso~uʡ ko~u i to~ukajaj a maɾinaħaj a matajaɾ ato~u miʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj a saɾikaka ato~u o~u kiwkaj no~u misaʡamisaj saan ko~u ħaratəŋ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra. taɾaʦo~uwa, mato~u matkəɬ~ɮaj niŋra ko~u tatajaɾən to~u sapifaɾiʦ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas, kirami ʦaaj ka sawaɬ~ɮən niŋra ko~u naŋa*to~uan niŋra a tatajaɾən, o~u kɬ~ɮəʦ ħananaj niŋra ko~u safatəɾ a maʡo~urip, o~u fɾo~un ħananaj niŋra ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ niŋra to~u saka ɾaħʦiaw a mirinaʡ to~u ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ. o~unini ħawi, o~u pisaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ no~u nijaħ a mirko~u to~uno~u kawasan a patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i ʦiŋraan. jo~u itinito~u i tajpak ʦiŋra i, maɾaħʦiaj a nirinaʡan niŋra a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ħawi, **** miħəʦa no~u "amis ɬ~ɮiʦtio~unarj" (masaso~utiriʡ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis, no~u ħo~uɾam ato~u no~u amiɾika) ato~u **** miħəʦa no~u "o~u ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis" (masaso~utiriʡ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis, no~u ħo~uɾam ato~u no~u amiɾika) ato~u **** miħəʦa no~u "*** a kakimaɬ~ɮan no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ". o~u nipifo~uɾsak to~u sapaɾo~uma to~u saki ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis ato~u piro~uʦo~uk to~u rajraj no~u to~uʡas jo~u ʦʦaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u **** a miħʦaan, masaɬ~ɮak ʦi afan a taɾaro~uma a nijaro~uʡ a ira ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮmakən niŋra, kirami itira ʦiŋra i ɾaɾan a mafaħaɾ a masto~uɾ no~u ħaija ʦiŋra, taɬ~ɮatataʡaŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮo~uka niŋra, na paisiŋ ʦiŋra to~u to~uɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ħawi, taɬ~ɮasiɬ~ɮaʡit ko~u safa niŋra to~u faʡinajan ʦi marko~u, saka aɾaanto~u no~u safa ʦiŋra a pataɾa amiɾika a paisiŋ, ʦaaj pakaaɾa to~u pinapina a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ i, maŋaɾəf ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ni afan siŋsi, saka pəɾək sato~u ʦiŋra. taɾaʦo~uwa ʦaaj a taɾa ni afan siŋsi a maninaʡ niŋra ko~u maʔminajto~u a mafaɾiʦ a marinaʡ a faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħʦaan, kirami mato~u so~uwaɾ ni jo~uħani itira i faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, so~uwaɾ sa, to~una mapataj ko~u ʦʦaj a sasafakan no~u ʔmi i sra, saka maɾəŋaw ʦira a maɾo~ufiʦto~u ko~u ħʦi no~u minaɾo~uan nira. saan. so~uʡɾinaj, o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ko~u nitajaɾan no~u ʡo~urip ni afan siŋsi, o~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a tataħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ a kaħməkən no~u mita o~u kasarajraj. taɾaʦo~uwa ʦaaj a taɾa ni afan siŋsi a maninaʡ niŋra ko~u maʔminajto~u a mafaɾiʦ a marinaʡ a faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħʦaan, kirami mato~u so~uwaɾ ni jo~uħani itira i faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, so~uwaɾ sa, "to~una mapataj ko~u ʦʦaj a sasafakan no~u ʔmi i sra, saka maɾəŋaw ʦira a maɾo~ufiʦto~u ko~u ħʦi no~u minaɾo~uan nira," saan.
